programme.title: 🌊 2.8m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.desc:
With onshore winds and the swell around 1.8 meters, it might be a good day to stay dry and watch someone else struggle.
🌊 Swell: 1.8m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.7m swell might offer a ride or two before the crosswind turns Supertubos into soup.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h WNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
1. 7m and onshore at Cantinho? More like Cantinho da Batida, mate.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 16s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That onshore wind will be fighting those 2.3m waves all day; I'll watch the carnage with a bica.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 16s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m
📋 Long period - powerful waves
